PreToolUse.description: Block inline SMTP / email-library sends; force use of send-report-email.py or send-briefing-email.py

PostToolUse.description: Enforce Pipeline C reference format: per-story **References** with [N] numbering, block blockquote/italic/global-refs deviations
Re-validate Pipeline C format after daily-editor Edit calls (reads file from disk since Edit doesn't pass full content)
